news.headline: Arista Networks stock trading lower after Q4 results: Revenue was $1.93 billion, EPS 65 cents, beating estimates.
news.summary: Arista Networks Inc (NYSE:ANET) saw its shares decline after unveiling its Q4 financial results. The company reported a revenue of $1.93 billion for the quarter, exceeding estimates of $1.9 billion. Earnings per share (EPS) stood at 65 cents, surpassing estimates of 57 cents. Total revenue increased by 25.3% year-over-year and by 6.6% from the prior quarter, with a gross margin of 63.8% in Q4. Arista highlighted a significant 95% year-over-year rise in operating cash flow, enhancing its financial position. The firm intends to utilize this cash flow for strategic investments in areas like AI and Campus markets.

news.headline: Stocks and Rand tumble in South Africa as Budget delay due to tax dispute.
Relesium™ launched as natural solution for GLP-1 users with GI issues, aiming to alleviate symptoms like nausea, diarrhea, and bloating.
news.summary: A new gut-health solution called Relesium™ has been launched in Boulder, Colo. The product is designed specifically for GLP-1 users and aims to address occasional gastrointestinal (GI) issues. Relesium is an all-natural dietary supplement with a patented formula, offering a safe and clinically backed option for individuals experiencing side effects like nausea, diarrhea, constipation, and bloating from GLP-1 weight-loss medications such as Ozempic. This solution is now available to provide targeted relief and support for gut health to those in need.

news.headline: Globalstar (Nasdaq: GSAT) to showcase its products at MWC Barcelona, a premier mobile event attracting industry leaders.
news.summary: Globalstar, Inc., a leading telecommunications infrastructure and technology provider (Nasdaq: GSAT), is set to exhibit its varied range of connectivity products and services at the upcoming Mobile World Congress in Barcelona from March 3 to March 6. The event, known as one of the foremost gatherings in the mobile technology sector, will host numerous industry players, pioneers, and key figures to delve into the prospects of connectivity. Globalstar’s involvement in the event underscores its commitment to innovation and collaboration in shaping the future of telecommunications.

news.headline: Trump set to urge for increased investment from Saudi Arabia, report reveals.
Haivision's 2025 Report highlights industry shifts with insights from 900 broadcast professionals.
news.summary: Findings from the 2025 Broadcast Transformation Report provide valuable insights on current industry trends. The report is the result of a survey conducted with approximately 900 professionals working in broadcasting.

news.headline: Report delves into complexity of above-ground silver stocks, highlighting its historical significance and current industrial importance. Silver hoarded in coins, bars, and other forms - key as investment asset.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, it was stated that silver, an uncommon and valuable metal, holds significant intrinsic value, acting as a form of money historically and remaining relevant as an investment. Particularly crucial during the industrial era, silver serves as a vital commodity due to its distinctive properties, essential for various industrial uses, notably in clean energy applications. The scarcity and value of silver have always incentivized individuals to securely store the metal in forms like coins, bars, and silverware. Additionally, its presence in jewelry and other fabricated goods adds further value. The collective amount of these different forms of silver represents the above-ground reserves of the metal, showcasing its enduring appeal. For more on this topic, the full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: West Red Lake Gold increases size of previously announced bought deal public offering.
news.summary: Last month, a record-breaking number of 250,000 new jobs were added to the economy, exceeding all previous forecasts. This surge in employment led to a drop in the unemployment rate to 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the last decade. Additionally, wages increased by an average of 3.5% across various industries. Experts attribute these positive economic indicators to robust consumer spending and increased business investments. This upward trend is seen as a clear sign of a strong and growing economy.

news.headline: Ignite Proteomics acquires PLA Code 0249U for the proteomic breast cancer assay from Theralink Technologies, integrating lab capabilities and IP assets.
news.summary: Golden, CO - Feb. 19, 2025 - Ignite Proteomics LLC, a subsidiary of IMAC Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: BACK), has announced the successful transfer of Proprietary Laboratory Analyses (PLA) code 0249U from Theralink Technologies, Inc. The AMA CPT code is included in the Medicare Clinical Laboratory Fee Schedule (CLFS) and is covered by the Palmetto GBA MolDx "Proteomics Testing" article (A59636). This development marks the integration of both laboratory capabilities and intellectual property related to the proteomic breast cancer assay into Ignite Proteomics.

news.headline: Jamf (NASDAQ: JAMF) recognized in 2025 Gartner Market Guide for Endpoint Management Tools.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Minneapolis, it was reported that Jamf (NASDAQ: JAMF), a leading company specializing in managing and securing Apple products in work environments, has been recognized as a Representative Vendor in the 2025 Gartner® Market Guide for Endpoint Management Tools. This acknowledgment solidifies Jamf's position as a notable player in the industry.

news.headline: NAYA Biosciences nominates 5 new board members experienced in biotechnology, to be approved at shareholder meeting on March 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Sarasota, Florida and Miami, on February 19, 2025, NAYA Biosciences, a company focusing on oncology, autoimmune diseases, and women’s health, revealed that five new nominees with substantial bio-technology sector expertise have been put forth for approval at the shareholder meeting set for March 10, 2025. NAYA, listed on NASDAQ as NAYA, aims to bring revolutionary treatments to patients in these critical areas.

news.headline: RAI Institute shifts focus to drive AI impact, adds tools/services, expands partnerships globally.
news.summary: Based in Austin, Texas, the Responsible AI Institute (RAI Institute) is making significant moves to transform and expedite the advancement of responsible AI integration. To adapt to swift regulatory changes, corporate fear-of-missing-out, and the emergence of autonomous AI systems, RAI Institute is broadening its focus from advocating policy to implementing AI-based solutions, agentic AI services, and introducing fresh AI verification, badging, and benchmarking initiatives. Supported by a recently established partner network and partnerships with universities in the U.S., U.K., and India, the institute is at the forefront of this evolving landscape.

news.headline: WellSky launched a resource management solution benefiting Doctor’s Choice Home Care & Hospice with increased patient visit capacity and reduced mileage per visit in Overland Park, Kan.
news.summary: In Overland Park, Kansas, Doctor’s Choice Home Care & Hospice has reported a notable rise in patient visit capacity and a reduction in mileage per visit. The early user of this service has seen a significant increase in their ability to attend to patients, along with a decrease in the distance traveled for each visit.

news.headline: Genmab officials to join fireside chat at 45th Annual TD Cowen Health Care Conference in Boston on March 3, 2025. Webcast at Genmab's website.
news.summary: Genmab A/S (Nasdaq: GMAB) shared on February 19, 2025 that their Chief Financial Officer Anthony Pagano and Chief Development Officer Judith Klimovsky are set to engage in a fireside chat at the 45th Annual TD Cowen Health Care Conference in Boston, Massachusetts, at 1:50 PM EST (7:50 PM CET) on March 3, 2025. To catch the conversation, a webcast will be accessible on Genmab’s website at https://ir.genmab.com/events-presentations.

news.headline: Finland loyalty market to grow by 15.1% annually, reaching US$282 million in 2025, led by S Group and Kesko.
news.summary: Dublin - A new report on the Finland loyalty programs market has been released, providing insights into key performance indicators (KPIs) and future growth prospects. The report predicts that the loyalty market in Finland will experience a 15.1% annual growth rate, reaching a total of US$282 million by 2025. This represents a significant compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 17% since 2020. The report covers various aspects such as trends in loyalty programs across different sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. It is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: Primaris REIT priced a $200 million unsecured debenture offering maturing on March 1, 2031, through a syndicate of agents.
news.summary: In Toronto, Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust revealed its plans to undergo a private placement known as the Offering, which involves selling $200 million in senior unsecured debentures set to mature on March 1, 2031. A syndicate of agents, spearheaded by TD Securities Inc., Desjardins Capital Markets, and RBC Dominion Securities Inc., alongside CIBC, will be managing the sale of the Debentures across various Canadian provinces.

news.headline: Garmin's Q4 revenue grows 23% to $1.82B, beating estimates; EPS $2.41 exceeds $2.03 consensus. Fitness revenue up 31% to $539.31M.
news.summary: Garmin Ltd (NYSE:GRMN) announced impressive fiscal fourth-quarter 2024 results, with revenue surging by 23% year-on-year to $1.82 billion, surpassing the projected $1.70 billion. The company's pro forma EPS of $2.41 also outperformed the estimated $2.03. Subsequently, the stock saw an uptick following the release of the report. Notably, revenue from the Fitness segment saw a significant growth of 31% year over year, reaching $539.31 million, primarily driven by the increased demand for wearables. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com. In contrast, Iron Mountain also reported strong Q4 earnings, noting growth in Storage and Data Center revenue, a 10% rise in dividends, and a promising outlook for 2025.

news.headline: Navigator Gas acquires first of three handysize liquefied ethylene gas carriers. Deal closed on Feb 19, 2025.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Navigator Holdings Ltd. (NYSE: NVGS), widely known as Navigator Gas, disclosed the finalization of the procurement of the initial vessel out of the three vessels detailed on January 7, 2025. Navigator Gas stands as the possessor and operator of the most extensive handysize liquefied gas carriers fleet globally.

news.headline: RFG Advisory launches Strodtman Wealth Management in Texas, expanding presence in Dallas-Fort Worth area; 5th TX team.
news.summary: In Birmingham, Alabama, RFG Advisory introduced Strodtman Wealth Management (SWM) led by CFP® Patrick Strodtman, enhancing RFG’s footprint in Dallas-Fort Worth. SWM, the fifth Texas-based team to partner with RFG, offers comprehensive financial services for long-term client relationships.

news.headline: G2 reveals 2025 Best Software Award Winners based on user reviews & market data. Only <1% of 150,000 vendors made the list.
news.summary: G2, based in Chicago, has revealed the recipients of its Best Software Awards through user reviews and market data. With over 150,000 vendors considered, less than 1% made it to the top listings. The awards cover 44 categories, honoring the top 100 global software companies and products.

news.headline: New book "The Wines of California" by Elaine Chukan Brown offers fresh insights on California's wine legacy. 4th largest wine producer.
news.summary: Académie du Vin Library has unveiled the launch of "The Wines of California" by esteemed wine writer Elaine Chukan Brown. The book, part of The Classic Wine Library series, will be published in April 2025, offering fresh insights into California's wines, history, and culture. Despite being the fourth largest wine producer globally, the state grapples with several misconceptions that Elaine addresses in this much-anticipated release.

news.headline: Wix's Q4 revenue hits $460.46m, beats EPS at $1.93. Creative Subs revenue up 11%, Partners revenue up 29%. Business Solutions revenue grew by 21%.
news.summary: Wix.com Ltd (NASDAQ: WIX) released its fiscal Q4 2024 results on Wednesday, with revenue reaching $460.46 million, reflecting a 14% increase from the previous year. Despite this growth, it slightly missed the analyst consensus of $461.75 million. The adjusted EPS stood at $1.93, surpassing the anticipated $1.59. Within the report, it was noted that Creative Subscription revenue grew by 11% Y/Y, totaling $329.7 million, while bookings for Creative Subscriptions saw a 15% Y/Y increase to $325.2 million. The Creative Subscriptions ARR reached $1.34 billion, marking a 13% Y/Y rise. Additionally, Partners revenue reached $168.1 million, a 29% Y/Y increase, whereas Business Solutions revenue went up by 21% Y/Y to $130.7 million, with bookings soaring by 25% Y/Y to $139.4 million. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Adventure Box Technology AB has successfully acquired Lion Gaming Group Inc. in a recent deal.

Horizon3.ai's NodeZero® surpasses 100,000 pentests for 3,000+ customers, projected to exceed 400,000 by 2026. Orgs shift to autonomous pentesting for continuous attack validation amid rising cyber threats.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from San Francisco, Horizon3.ai, a renowned provider of autonomous security solutions, revealed that their product NodeZero® has achieved a significant milestone by completing over 100,000 pentests for more than 3,000 clients. Projections suggest this number will surge to over 400,000 by the conclusion of 2026. This escalation in pentests signifies a shift in organizations' approaches to cybersecurity, moving away from occasional, compliance-focused tests to constant attack verification using NodeZero. This change mirrors a rising desire for security strategies grounded in proof, empowering teams to identify, address, and prevent potential cyber threats.

news.headline: Five9’s Intelligent CX Platform now on Google Cloud Marketplace globally, including AI Agents, streamlining procurement and deployment for businesses.
news.summary: In San Ramon, California, Five9 (Nasdaq: FIVN) has expanded its reach by becoming globally available on Google Cloud Marketplace. This move includes the launch of Five9 AI Agents for Google Cloud. This development allows any company worldwide to easily access Five9 through Google Cloud Marketplace, streamlining the process of acquiring, invoicing, and implementing an AI-enhanced Customer Experience (CX) for shared clients. The Five9 AI Agents offer a new approach to virtual agents, aiming to enhance customer interactions.

news.headline: H5 Data Centers and SAT-IX partner with DE-CIX to offer turnkey connectivity for San Antonio customers, eliminating transport costs.
news.summary: H5 Data Centers, a prominent wholesale data center provider, has announced a significant collaboration with SAT-IX, making it the first Internet Exchange (IX) to join forces with DE-CIX as a Turnkey Connectivity Partner. This partnership has enabled SAT-IX customers at H5 San Antonio to efficiently connect and peer with networks in Dallas, eliminating the necessity for third-party transport solutions or charges related to remote cross connects. This development marks a new turnkey solution for customers, highlighting the innovation and streamlined connectivity facilitated by the partnership.

news.headline: Arima Genomics in Carlsbad makes 3 strategic hires to advance clinical applications of 3D genomics.
news.summary: In Carlsbad, California, Arima Genomics has bolstered their executive team with three key hires to drive the development of clinical uses for 3D genomics. The company's focus on advancing this cutting-edge technology is evident in these strategic additions, emphasizing their commitment to innovation. This move underscores their dedication to exploring the potential of 3D genomics in clinical settings, highlighting the importance of this emerging field.

news.headline: Tideworks Technology marks 15 years of Intermodal Pro, boosting rail innovation and efficiency.
news.summary: Seattle-based Tideworks Technology is commemorating a significant milestone as they mark 15 years of their flagship product, Intermodal Pro. This innovative software has been instrumental in advancing rail operations by enhancing efficiency and productivity within the industry. Tideworks Technology has been a key player in this sector, with Intermodal Pro playing a crucial role in streamlining processes. This celebration underscores the company's commitment to technological advancement and dedication to providing cutting-edge solutions for the rail industry.

news.headline: InMoment named to Constellation ShortList™ for Conversational Intelligence for Customer Service in Q1 2025; 23 solutions evaluated.
news.summary: InMoment®, a prominent provider of integrated Experience Improvement (XI)™ solutions, has been recognized in the Constellation ShortList™ for Conversational Intelligence for Customer Service for Q1 2025. This prestigious list features technology vendors and service providers crucial for early adopters and fast-following organizations seeking essential transformation initiatives. The evaluation process included over 23 solutions within this market segment.

news.headline: Lumu introduces Playback™ for MSPs, streamlining compliance & threat detection. Stores network metadata for analysis.
news.summary: Lumu, a cybersecurity company based in Miami, has introduced a new feature called Playback for Managed Service Providers (MSPs). This feature allows MSPs to collect, analyze, and store network metadata, such as network logs, to generate actionable threat intelligence. The technology, known as Continuous Compromise Assessment®, is popular among various industries including finance, healthcare, and government sectors. With Playback, organizations can proactively enhance their cybersecurity measures.

news.headline: AtScale integrates with Snowflake Cortex Analyst for AI-powered natural language data queries in Boston.
news.summary: In Boston, AtScale has announced an integration with Snowflake Cortex Analyst for AI-powered natural language data queries. This collaboration aims to streamline data querying processes for users. Snowflake Cortex Analyst utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance the efficiency and accuracy of natural language queries. This integration is expected to provide significant benefits to users seeking to analyze data swiftly and effectively.

news.headline: Blaize (NASDAQ:BZAI) to present at KeyBanc Emerging Tech Summit on March 4, 2025 at 2:30pm PT/5:30pm ET. Webcast link: https://wsw.com/webcast/key33/bzai/1665370.
news.summary: A company based in El Dorado Hills, California, Blaize Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:BZAI), known for its purpose-built, artificial intelligence (AI)-enabled edge computing solutions, disclosed plans to participate and present at an upcoming investor conference. The event, KeyBanc Emerging Technology Summit scheduled for March 4, 2025, will feature Blaize Holdings at 2:30pm PT/5:30pm ET. The presentation will be accessible via webcast at https://wsw.com/webcast/key33/bzai/1665370, with both live viewing and archived replay options available for interested parties.

news.headline: ResultsCX recognized as 'Innovator' in CX Center Business Process Transformation by Avasant, moving up from 'Disruptor' status.
news.summary: ResultsCX, a company based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, offering Customer Experience Management services, has recently been acknowledged as an 'Innovator' in Avasant’s Contact Center Business Process Transformation 2024–2025 RadarView™ assessment. This marks a notable advancement from their previous classification as a 'Disruptor'. The recognition comes from Avasant, a reputable management consulting firm, and demonstrates ResultsCX's expertise in CX transformation. The company serves top global organizations, including Fortune 100 and Fortune 500 companies, further emphasizing their industry position.

news.headline: Upland Panviva launches AI-powered Sidekick for agents in contact centers, offering compliant knowledge delivery.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Upland Software, Inc., a renowned provider of AI-powered cloud software for digital transformation, has introduced a new product called Sidekick through Upland Panviva. Sidekick aims to provide agents in contact centers - often seen as the heroes in this industry - with compliant and context-specific knowledge. Panviva, a trusted leader in heavily regulated sectors, offers advanced AI-driven support tailored for intricate and compliance-focused businesses. Through Panviva, organizations can access adaptable solutions designed to enhance agent performance and compliance adherence. Upland Software, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol UPLD, showcasing its prominence in the market.

news.headline: Millicom (Tigo) announces Q4 2024 results and virtual meeting. #telecom #quarterlyresults
UpTime Solutions appoints Matthew Knuth as Director of Reliability Solutions with 25 years experience in industry.
news.summary: UpTime Solutions, a prominent provider of wireless condition monitoring solutions based in Jacksonville, Florida, revealed the appointment of Matthew Knuth as the Director of Reliability Solutions. Knuth, boasting over 25 years of expertise in condition monitoring and reliability engineering, will have a crucial function in the company's growth strategy, education initiatives within the market, and advancement of predictive maintenance technologies. This addition comes at a significant juncture, coinciding with McKinsey's estimation that the Internet of Things (IoT) will reach a pivotal stage.

news.headline: Pioneer Power (Nasdaq: PPSI) reports impressive growth and profitability for Q4 and full year 2024.
news.summary: Fort Lee-based Pioneer Power Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: PPSI) disclosed its preliminary unaudited financial performance for Q4 and FY 2024, demonstrating significant growth and enhanced profitability. The company is known for its expertise in designing, producing, servicing, and integrating distributed energy resources, power generation tools, and mobile EV charging solutions. The report indicates a successful year for Pioneer, with strong financial figures pointing towards positive outcomes for the period ending on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: CenterWell ready to expand primary care services in 2025, targeting a 20% growth in patient reach.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was detailed that the unemployment rate in the country has seen a decrease to 5.8%, marking a significant improvement from the previous month. This positive trend was accompanied by an increase of 300,000 new jobs being added to the economy. Additionally, the report highlighted a growth of 3.5% in the GDP for the last quarter, surpassing expectations and indicating a strong economic recovery. The stock market also experienced a notable surge, with the main index rising by 4% to reach an all-time high of 35,000 points. These developments reflect a promising outlook for the overall financial landscape of the nation.

news.headline: SANUWAVE Health CEO to join 37th Annual Roth Conference on Mar 16-18 in Dana Point, California. OTQB: SNWV, FDA-approved wound care products.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, SANUWAVE Health, Inc., a top provider of FDA-approved wound care products (OTCQB: SNWV), revealed that Morgan Frank, the Chief Executive Officer, will be attending the 37th Annual Roth Conference from March 16-18 at Laguna Cliffs Marriott Resort & Spa in Dana Point, California.

news.headline: ServiceMac awarded gold by Freddie Mac in 2024 SHARP program for servicing 75,000-199,999 mortgages.
news.summary: ServiceMac, a mortgage subservicer, part of the First American family, was recognized by Freddie Mac in their 2024 Servicer Honors and Rewards Program (SHARPSM). The company received the gold award in the category for servicers managing between 75,000-199,999 Freddie Mac mortgages. The SHARP awards acknowledge outstanding servicers with excellent customer service programs. This recognition highlights ServiceMac's commitment to providing high-quality service to a significant number of Freddie Mac mortgages in their portfolio.

news.headline: TD Bank survey finds optimism in 2025 investments despite challenges. 76% expect commercial property values to drop.
news.summary: In Cherry Hill, New Jersey, a recent survey conducted by TD Bank at the CRE Finance Council Miami revealed that despite challenges such as increasing energy costs, office vacancies, interest rates, and economic uncertainties due to a new administration, commercial real estate leaders remain optimistic about the potential opportunities in the industry. Over 200 professionals participated in the survey, with 76% expressing optimism for the commercial real estate market in 2025. This positive outlook persists amidst various current challenges faced by the industry.

news.headline: FICS® honored in HousingWire HWTech100 list for 12th year in a row.
news.summary: For the 12th year in a row, FICS® (Financial Industry Computer Systems, Inc.) has been recognized on the HousingWire HWTech100 list. This prestigious list acknowledges top technology innovators in the housing industry.

news.headline: Hometap partners with Heading Home to support housing stability in Greater Boston to address critical housing needs.
news.summary: Today, Hometap, a financial technology company located in Boston, revealed its Blueprint-level collaboration with Heading Home, the primary provider of services for homeless families with children in the Boston area. This partnership highlights Hometap's dedication to tackling essential housing requirements. Hometap is known for pioneering debt-free home equity financing for American homeowners. The collaboration solidifies their commitment to addressing critical housing needs. Heading Home, as the largest provider of services for homeless families with children in Boston, will work closely with Hometap in this venture. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in supporting the community.

news.headline: Snapdocs first to achieve MISMO® certification for eVault, ensuring secure storage of eNotes. Strengthening digital closing compliance.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Snapdocs, a top digital closing provider in the mortgage industry, has made history by becoming the first to meet MISMO's eVault System Standards. This showcases their dedication to enhancing secure, compliant, and smooth electronic promissory note (eNotes) transactions. Following a thorough third-party assessment, Snapdocs' eVault has been certified to meet all specified operational and technical criteria for securely storing and managing eNotes. This recognition highlights Snapdocs' leadership and innovation in ensuring trustworthy and efficient digital mortgage processes.

news.headline: Cintas Corp named as one of Canada's Best Employers by Forbes for its flexible benefits, culture, and innovation commitment.
news.summary: A company located in Mississauga, Ontario has recently been acknowledged for its outstanding features in the business sector. Cintas has been praised for its adaptable benefits system, positive work environment, and dedication to advancing technology and ideas.

news.headline: PPG & PPG Foundation invested $18.4 million in worldwide communities in 2024, benefiting various causes.
news.summary: In 2024, PPG along with PPG Foundation made a significant investment of $18.4 million in global communities.

news.headline: Columbia Sportswear and Intuitive Machines collaborate for lunar mission, using 2 patented technologies for heat protection.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, two patented technologies from Columbia Sportswear are set to safeguard Intuitive Machines' lunar lander from the harsh temperatures of space. The collaboration aims to shield the spacecraft as it ventures into space, ensuring its resilience to extreme conditions.

news.headline: Sauer Brands acquired by Advent International, global private equity investor, from Falfurrias Capital Partners. Terms undisclosed.
news.summary: Sauer Brands Inc., a prominent company known for its various condiments and seasonings, has been acquired by Advent International, a top global private equity investor. The acquisition from Falfurrias Capital Partners has been finalized, though the specific terms of the transaction have not been revealed. This acquisition marks a significant development in the industry, showcasing the strategic growth of Sauer Brands under the guidance of Advent International.

news.headline: Capri Holdings sets long-term financial targets at investor day in NYC; optimistic about growth for Versace, Choo, Kors.
news.summary: Capri Holdings Limited (NYSE:CPRI), a global fashion luxury group, is holding its 2025 Investor Day in New York City today. The company is unveiling long-term financial goals during the event. John D. Idol, the Chairman and CEO of the company, expressed confidence in the growth prospects for Versace, Jimmy Choo, and Michael Kors. He emphasized the enduring value and successful track record of these brands.

news.headline: Japan loyalty program market to reach $3.87 billion by 2025 with 15.4% annual growth, led by Rakuten, Aeon, and 7-Eleven.
news.summary: A report titled "Japan Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The loyalty market in Japan is projected to experience a 15.4% annual growth, with an estimated value of US$3.87 billion by 2025. Over the period of 2020-2025, the Japanese loyalty market has shown a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 17.1% in terms of value. The report includes 50+ key performance indicators on loyalty program trends across different sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics.
